message: claim_type = mathlib_native; mathlib_native_mode=True; skipping preamble-derived direct-close candidates.
Retrieved mathlib premises for the active goal.

retrieved_premises.docstring: The point provided by `ContractingWith.fixedPoint` is actually a fixed point.
retrieved_premises.name: fixedPoint_isFixedPt

retrieved_premises.docstring: Every point is a fixed point of `id`.
retrieved_premises.name: isFixedPt_id

retrieved_premises.docstring: Banach fixed-point theorem, contraction mapping theorem, `EMetricSpace` version. A contracting map on a complete metric space has a fixed point. We include more conclusions in this theorem to avoid proving them again later. The main API for this theorem are the functions `efixedPoint` and `fixedPoint`, and lemmas about these functions.
retrieved_premises.name: exists_fixedPoint
retrieved_premises.statement: (hf : ContractingWith K f) (x : α) (hx : edist x (f x) ≠ ∞) : ∃ y, IsFixedPt f y ∧ Tendsto (fun n ↦ f^[n] x) atTop (𝓝 y) ∧ ∀ n : ℕ, edist (f^[n] x) y ≤ edist x (f x) * (K : ℝ≥0∞) ^ n / (1 - K)

retrieved_premises.docstring: Banach fixed-point theorem for maps contracting on a complete subset.
retrieved_premises.name: exists_fixedPoint'
retrieved_premises.statement: {s : Set α} (hsc : IsComplete s) (hsf : MapsTo f s s) (hf : ContractingWith K <| hsf.restrict f s s) {x : α} (hxs : x ∈ s) (hx : edist x (f x) ≠ ∞) : ∃ y ∈ s, IsFixedPt f y ∧ Tendsto (fun n ↦ f^[n] x) atTop (𝓝 y) ∧ ∀ n : ℕ, edist (f^[n] x) y ≤ edist x (f x) * (K : ℝ≥0∞) ^ n / (1 - K)

retrieved_premises.name: efixedPoint_isFixedPt'
retrieved_premises.statement: {s : Set α} (hsc : IsComplete s) (hsf : MapsTo f s s) (hf : ContractingWith K <| hsf.restrict f s s) {x : α} (hxs : x ∈ s) (hx : edist x (f x) ≠ ∞) : IsFixedPt f (efixedPoint' f hsc hsf hf x hxs hx)
